docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY NOLAN, CHARLES LAMBERT, MICHAEL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,200.00 FILED BY NOLAN, CHARLES AS TO DEFENDANT LAMBERT, MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF OCT-24-2023 AT 10:00 AM FOR 1)FAILING TO FILE PROPER GOVERNMENTAL CLAIM UNDER CAL. GOVT. CODE SECTIONS 905 AND 915, AND 2) NAMING IMPROPER DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF CHARLES NOLAN APPEARED. DEFENDANT MICHAEL LAMBERT APPEARED. ASHLEY CARNEGIE, CLAIMS ADJUSTER, ALSO APPEARED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARGARET WU; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$20.00) SERVED SEP-05-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAMBERT, MICHAEL
